debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

failed_attempts:
by
  have h3 : ∀ y, y ∈ A → y = a := by
    intro y hy
    by_contra hneq
    have h5 : y ∈ A \ {a} := by
      simp [Set.mem_diff, hy, hneq]
    have h6 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
    have h8 : y ∉ A \ {a} := by
      rw [show A \ {a} = ∅ by simpa using h6]
      simp
    contradiction
  ext x
  simp
  constructor
  · -- Assume x ∈ A
    intro h
    apply h3 x h
  · -- Assume x = a
    intro h
    rw [h]
    exact h1

by
  ext x
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  constructor
  · -- Assume x ∈ A, prove x = a
    intro h
    have h3 : x ∈ A := h
    by_cases h4 : x = a
    · -- If x = a, then it's trivial
      simp [h4]
    · -- Assume x ≠ a
      have h5 : x ≠ a := h4
      have h6 : x ∈ (A \ {a}) := by
        simp [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, h5] at *
        all_goals
          try { tauto }
          try { 
            have h7 : x ∈ A := h3
            tauto
          }
      have h7 : empty (A \ {a}) := h2
      contradiction
  · -- Assume x = a, prove x ∈ A
    intro h
    rw [h] at *
    exact h1
